entries.name: Imp

skills.name: Enrage
skills.text: 【INS + WLP】 · 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. Offensive spell. The target suffers enraged and cannot perform the Guard or Spell actions on their next turn.

skills.name: Shell
skills.text: 10 MP · Self · Scene. Until this spell ends, the imp gains Resistance to physical damage.

entries.text: The weakest of demons. Imps originate from the dark thoughts of a single person or small community. They are cowards.

entries.name: Lightning Wheel

skills.name: Fulgur
skills.text: 【INS + WLP】+1 · 10 × T MP · Up to three creatures · Instantaneous. Offensive spell. Each target suffers 【HR + 15】 bolt damage. Opportunity: Each target suffers dazed.

skills.name: Quick
skills.text: When the lightning wheel fills or erases sections of a Clock related to escaping or pursuing, they may fill or erase two additional sections.

entries.text: Born from the fears of travelers, these cruel demons ride inside a large wooden wheel surrounded by lightning.

entries.name: Shadow Howler

attacks.name: Ember Breath
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers 【HR + 15】 fire damage and suffers weak.

attacks.name: Howls of Tragedy
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 5 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers shaken.

entries.text: This massive dog is said to appear when a great catastrophe is about to take place — they are not evil but mere harbingers of tragedy.

entries.name: Echidna

attacks.name: Cold Glare
attacks.text: The target cannot perform the Objective action on their next turn. This attack targets Magic Defense.

attacks.name: Brain Melt
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 5 × T MP · Up to three creatures · Instantaneous. Each target loses 【HR + 10】 Mind Points.

skills.name: Eloquent
skills.text: The echidna gains a +3 bonus to Opposed Checks during social occasions.

entries.text: These dangerous fiends are the embodiments of suspicion and strife. Their legs end in a twisting swarm of snakes.
